source_description: Create comprehensive end-user documentation for using mittwald-mcp with Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, and Codex CLI. Documentation includes tool-specific OAuth getting-started guides, conceptual explainers (MCP, agentic coding), auto-generated reference documentation for all 115 MCP tools, and 10 case study tutorials based on 015 research. Build two separate Astro-based static sites with mittwald.de branding and configurable base URLs.
